picks.quote: I do like Liam Paro to become a two-division world champion. I think we're going to hear and new. But the bet I like... I'm going Liam Paro on points.

I like Liam Talaha even with his inexperience. I like him having levels to his game with each fight. I like where he's trending and I think the 31-year-old ultra-athletic explosive southpaw is going to be too much for Dempsey McKean.
